rows.description: Nov. 7 Paying & lighting Tax to Midṣ. Cast.
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms `gemini-flash` values. `gpt-5-mini` misread shillings as '1' and pence as '0', likely due to poor image clarity for those specific digits in its training or OCR. `gemini-flash`'s description is also more accurate ('Midṣ. Cast.' vs 'Mid: East').

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of the lighting tax (Midsummer), amounting to £1 14s 6d.

rows.description: & Renewal of three City Leases for 40 years from L. Day last Fine 12£ Leases. 11.12.0
